rationale: The citing paper’s core mechanism is mental/resource depletion (it explicitly measures depletion and tests moderated mediation in Study 4), and the cited paper is a direct resource-depletion-in-choice article. That makes this citation plausibly a theory/mechanism foundation rather than a generic mention. The DOI match is exact (10.1509/jmkr.46.3.344), so this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
